plugins.name: brainstorming
plugins.description: Use when creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior - before any creative or implementation work begins

plugins.name: writing-plans
plugins.description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code

plugins.name: orchestrating
plugins.description: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session

plugins.name: plan-review
plugins.description: Use when a plan has been written and before execution begins

plugins.name: implementation-review
plugins.description: Use when a multi-task implementation is complete and ready for holistic review before merging

plugins.name: codebase-review
plugins.description: Use when asked to audit a codebase, find DRY/YAGNI/complexity issues repo-wide, or perform periodic code quality review

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Use when work is complete and ready to create a PR for review. Triggers include "/ship", "ship it", "commit and push", "create PR".

plugins.name: merge-pr
plugins.description: Use when a PR has been reviewed and is ready to merge, or when triggered by "/merge-pr", "merge the PR", "address review feedback", "review feedback ready".

plugins.name: skill-eval
plugins.description: Use when evaluating skill output quality, comparing skill versions, running behavioral evals, benchmarking a skill, or when triggered by /skill-eval
